title: Opening for Category Manager at Meesho South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Meesho South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Meesho South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Meesho South Asia Partners:
Meesho South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho South Asia Partners!
